title: hurst-aware-partitioning: Pre-registration and reproducibility package for Hurst-aware adaptive partitioning of persistent time series
description: Pre-registration document, reference implementation skeleton, and reproducibility scaffolding for a benchmark study of Hurst-aware adaptive chunk-boundary partitioning against fixed-interval (TimescaleDB-style) and variance-aware (CUSUM) baselines. Datasets: 50-ticker S&P 500 OHLCV (2015-2026), Numenta Anomaly Benchmark, synthetic fGn corpus with known Hurst. Estimators registered: DFA(2), R/S, GHE, wavelet. Primary outcome: bytes read per query under a registered 100-query workload, with paired Wilcoxon and Holm-Bonferroni correction across the hypothesis family. No empirical results on registered datasets are included in this release; the package archives the pre-registered protocol and reference scaffolding only.
